annexTitle: Annex A — Reference Control Objectives and Controls
description: Annex A provides a comprehensive set of AI-specific control objectives and controls. Organizations select applicable controls based on their AI risk assessment.

controls.title: AI Policy
controls.summary: Establish an AI policy appropriate to the organization's purpose, providing a framework for setting AI objectives.

controls.title: Review of AI Policy
controls.summary: Review AI policy at planned intervals or when significant changes occur.

controls.title: Roles and Responsibilities
controls.summary: Define and assign roles and responsibilities for AI system development, provision, and use.

controls.title: AI System Impact Assessment
controls.summary: Assess the impact of AI systems on individuals, groups, and society.

controls.title: Intended Use and Misuse Documentation
controls.summary: Document intended use and reasonably foreseeable misuse of AI systems.

controls.title: Stakeholder Engagement
controls.summary: Identify and engage with stakeholders affected by AI systems.

controls.title: Transparency of AI Systems
controls.summary: Ensure appropriate transparency about the AI system to relevant stakeholders.

controls.title: Notification of AI Interaction
controls.summary: Notify individuals when they are interacting with or subject to AI systems.

controls.title: Explainability of AI Output
controls.summary: Provide explanations for AI system outputs appropriate to the context and audience.

controls.title: Accessibility
controls.summary: Consider accessibility requirements when designing and deploying AI systems.

controls.title: AI System Requirements
controls.summary: Define requirements for AI systems including functional, performance, and trustworthiness requirements.

controls.title: AI System Design and Development
controls.summary: Design and develop AI systems according to defined requirements with appropriate documentation.

controls.title: Data Acquisition
controls.summary: Acquire data for AI systems in accordance with defined criteria including quality, relevance, and representativeness.

controls.title: Verification and Validation
controls.summary: Verify and validate AI systems to ensure they meet defined requirements.

controls.title: AI System Documentation
controls.summary: Document AI systems throughout their lifecycle including design decisions, architecture, and performance.

controls.title: Deployment
controls.summary: Deploy AI systems in accordance with defined procedures and approval processes.

controls.title: Operation and Monitoring
controls.summary: Operate and monitor AI systems to ensure continued performance within acceptable parameters.

controls.title: Data Quality
controls.summary: Define and implement data quality criteria for AI system training, validation, and testing data.

controls.title: Data Provenance
controls.summary: Record and maintain data provenance information throughout the AI system lifecycle.

controls.title: Data Privacy
controls.summary: Implement controls to protect privacy of personal data used in AI systems.

controls.title: Data for Addressing Bias
controls.summary: Ensure data is managed to identify and address potential biases in AI systems.

controls.title: Access Control
controls.summary: Control access to AI system components, models, data, and infrastructure.

controls.title: Security of AI System Components
controls.summary: Protect AI system components from security threats including adversarial attacks.

controls.title: Security Monitoring
controls.summary: Monitor AI systems for security events and incidents.

controls.title: Data Security
controls.summary: Protect data used in AI systems from unauthorized access, modification, or destruction.

controls.title: Performance Monitoring
controls.summary: Monitor AI system performance to detect degradation, drift, or anomalies.

controls.title: Impact Monitoring
controls.summary: Monitor the impact of AI systems on individuals, groups, and society.

controls.title: Incident Management
controls.summary: Establish and implement processes for managing AI system incidents.

controls.title: Log Management
controls.summary: Maintain logs of AI system activities for audit, investigation, and monitoring purposes.

controls.title: Third-Party Components
controls.summary: Manage risks from third-party AI components, models, data, and services.

controls.title: Customer Communication
controls.summary: Communicate relevant information about AI systems to customers and users.
